description: Color To Hex Code converts a Color to a string hex color code such as "#FFAABC".

fields.Color: The color to convert. Color components are clamped to the range 0-1.
fields.ShortForm: If true, convert to a short form such as "#FAC" instead of "#FFAACC".
fields.IncludeAlpha: If true, include the alpha channel as the last component.
fields.Prefix: The string to prefix the color code with. Defaults to "#".

notes.title: Gallery
notes.text: File:Protoflux_Color_To_Hex.webp|A simple example of Color To Hex with an input and an output display.
